risk_or_shortcut: Treating one familiar coordinate ansatz as the complete UDT metric.
map_control: Abstract coframe parent plus conditional 2+2 realization; no single ansatz is authoritative.
failure_if_violated: Reject any package that calls a diagonal, spherical, static, or 2+2 form the whole metric without a derivation.

risk_or_shortcut: Counting only the visible diagonal components.
map_control: The conditional 2+2 ledger contains exactly ten independent metric slots, including four mixed shifts and screen shear.
failure_if_violated: Fail on a missing, duplicated, or silently fixed slot.

risk_or_shortcut: Suppressing coordinate dependence to obtain an ODE.
map_control: All ten slots accept all four coordinates at the parent layer; every reduction has a separate ledger entry.
failure_if_violated: Fail if staticity, stationarity, homogeneity, spherical symmetry, or cohomogeneity is unstamped.

risk_or_shortcut: Turning the signed field phi into signed distance.
map_control: Phi is a signed dilation field; physical separation remains nonnegative and any observer-relative mapping is a separate open realization.
failure_if_violated: Fail if negative distance or a universal phi-distance identity enters.

risk_or_shortcut: Forgetting the reciprocal-c observational anchor.
map_control: Reciprocal clock/ruler identity is retained as founding structure while its spacetime realization remains conditional.
failure_if_violated: Fail if arithmetic reciprocity is either discarded or promoted directly into a unique metric/action.

risk_or_shortcut: Promoting the conditional reciprocal plane into a selected global distribution.
map_control: Projector, plane, screen, integrability, and global patching are explicit open fields/branches.
failure_if_violated: Fail if a global reciprocal plane is assumed from local null-line algebra.

risk_or_shortcut: Assuming phi is independent or metric-derived without an off-shell ruling.
map_control: Seven off-shell configuration branches are carried separately.
failure_if_violated: Fail if field content is collapsed before variation.

risk_or_shortcut: Calling C2/Bach the native action.
map_control: C2/Bach remains UNIQUE-CONDITIONAL only for the pre-scale local metric-only four-derivative premise class.
failure_if_violated: Fail on an unconditional native-action label.

risk_or_shortcut: Calling EH native because GR is successful.
map_control: EH remains a conditional post-scale/minimality or comparison lane, never an imported field equation.
failure_if_violated: Fail if familiarity supplies authority.

risk_or_shortcut: Letting action terms be selected by desired solutions.
map_control: Dynamics enter only after configuration/founded-constraint atlases freeze and Charles authorizes exact lanes.
failure_if_violated: Fail if a soliton, cosmology, GR match, or stability target feeds candidate selection.

risk_or_shortcut: Varying a symmetry-reduced action and mistaking it for the full equations.
map_control: P05 derives every full equation and boundary current before P07/P08 reductions.
failure_if_violated: Fail if reduced variation precedes full variation without an equivalence theorem.

risk_or_shortcut: Calling an ODE scan the complete solution space.
map_control: ODE work is explicitly a family of lower-dimensional strata; unrestricted completion requires PDE and global stages.
failure_if_violated: Fail if P08 or P09 closes all-coordinate dependence, topology, or global completeness.

risk_or_shortcut: Calling an arbitrary time-dependent configuration physical evolution.
map_control: P10 is forbidden until a full authorized operator and principal/constraint structure exist.
failure_if_violated: Fail if coordinate time dependence is equated with a native time law.

risk_or_shortcut: Assuming round angular geometry or a fixed S2 carrier.
map_control: Screen area, shear, off-diagonal shape, twist, topology, and section remain independent; the null-direction S2 is only a conditional fiber.
failure_if_violated: Fail if roundness, fixed target, section, transport, or carrier follows from the fiber alone.

risk_or_shortcut: Eliminating mixed phi-angular geometry as gauge.
map_control: Mixed shifts, their curvature, transverse phi gradients, screen shear, and reciprocal twist are load-bearing atlas axes.
failure_if_violated: Fail if zero shift/twist/shear is the default rather than one stratum.

risk_or_shortcut: Treating finite-cell language as a complete boundary condition.
map_control: Seal ontology, static seal datum, boundary regularity, phase, variation, charge, and time-live completion are separate fields.
failure_if_violated: Fail if the limited static seal selects a universal boundary.

risk_or_shortcut: Selecting a physical CSN representative silently.
map_control: Pre-scale conformal class, gauge bookkeeping, and post-scale representative-selection branches are distinct.
failure_if_violated: Fail if a scale or representative appears without c/G/owner/theory provenance.

risk_or_shortcut: Dropping trivial, singular, degenerate, divergent, disconnected, or solver-failed branches.
map_control: The controlled outcome vocabulary retains all sixteen outcome classes and forbids merit filtering.
failure_if_violated: Fail if only smooth particle-like or converged branches count.

risk_or_shortcut: Using a stable Hopfion as a selector for the metric law.
map_control: Carrier/stability work is a downstream conditional readout after the metric atlas freezes.
failure_if_violated: Fail if the S2 posit or L2+L4 action enters the parent map.

risk_or_shortcut: Using GR or observations to sculpt the explored equations.
map_control: GR, empirical, matter, and stability readouts occur only after P12 freezes the atlas.
failure_if_violated: Fail if a comparison edge precedes the frozen atlas.

risk_or_shortcut: Using pre-July material as affirmative UDT physics.
map_control: Pre-July sources are marked failure/candidate/tooling only under the provenance firewall.
failure_if_violated: Fail if a pre-July path supplies an affirmative premise or equation.

risk_or_shortcut: Letting generated audit records influence their own candidate universe.
map_control: Source lineage marks package records as audit control only; the map is reconstructed from prior authority.
failure_if_violated: Fail on selection feedback from generated tables.

risk_or_shortcut: Launching computation because the plan is detailed.
map_control: P00 stops at owner review; each later stage has a distinct entry gate, falsification contract, and maximum conclusion.
failure_if_violated: Fail if this package itself authorizes P01 or a scientific solve.

risk_or_shortcut: Claiming completeness from one verification dimension.
map_control: Ten independent completeness criteria must all close within a named regime; the current table leaves their scientific closures open.
failure_if_violated: Fail if syntax, tests, algebra, ODE coverage, or numerical convergence alone earns COMPLETE.
